title: CBSE Board 12th Result 2026
short_information: Central Board of Secondary Education CBSE Central Board will soon release the results for the Class 10th Xth High School and Class 12th XIIth Intermediate Annual Board Exam 2026. The CBSE will declare the Secondary and Senior Secondary board Exam result April / May 2026. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll number on the official website. The official result date will be announced Soon. All registered students are advised to activate their DigiLocker accounts as soon as possible so that, once the results are released, they can receive their mark sheets and certificates in digital format via DigiLocker. Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) CBSE Board Class Xth and Class XIIth Result 2026 CBSE Results 2026 | Short Details of Notification

tables.table_name: Download Mobile Apps for Latest Updates
rows: Important Dates Class 10th High School Exam Between : 17/02/2026 to 11/03/2026 Class 12th Intermediate Exam Between : 17/02/2026 to 10/04/2026 Digilocker Account Activate Through Security Pin : 14/04/2026 Class 10th Result Declared : 15/04/2026 Class 10th Second Board Exam Date : 15-21 May 2026 Class 12th Result Declared : 13 May 2026
